goal: Sync all human- and agent-facing surfaces (docs, skills, CONTEXT.md) plus two runtime artifacts (RAG reindex, .mcp.json restore) to the shipped WO-REPO-REVIEW-2026-07-REMEDIATION-001 reality

tasks.description: Read coderef/workorder/repo-review-2026-07-remediation/post-close-verification-2026-07-02.txt and the close commit 4cd33af diff to fix the reality anchor. Success: every stale-claim location enumerated below is confirmed against current code before editing.
docs/CLI.md: remove the deleted --no-enrich flag from the semantic-integration section (examples currently fail). Success: no --no-enrich reference remains; examples run against the shipped CLI.

README.md: (a) fix the stale baseline line at L69 IN-METRIC — the line reads 'valid_edge_count=3464, header_missing_count=262'; replace with the current valid_edge_count (reality anchor 5154) + current header_missing_count. DO NOT substitute statistics.edgeCount (29123) — that is a DIFFERENT metric; conflating them injects a new falsehood (gap GAP-01). (b) fix the MCP bullet at L67 that claims '6 read-only intelligence tools' and lists exactly 6 -> 11 tools (same lie fixed in CONTEXT.md P3-T1; the README copy was previously uncovered — gap GAP-02). (c) remove the false 'also kept in sync' foundation-docs claim (~L443). (d) remove the plugin roadmap bullet (~L725, plugin system deleted in P2 3bbd97a). Success: baseline line uses the correct valid_edge_count metric; MCP tool count = 11; no plugin/foundation-sync falsehoods.

guide-to-coderef-core.md: remove imports of deleted buildGraph/saveGraph/GraphError and the entire error-handling chapter built on deleted src/errors/. Success: no reference to deleted symbols; query examples use the canonical-graph surface.

Regenerate coderef/foundation-docs/* from the current codebase (documents deleted AnalyzerService/QueryExecutor as public API with inverted semantics). If a generator exists, run it; else hand-correct to canonical-graph query surface. Success: foundation-docs describe only shipped exports with correct direction semantics.
examples/plugins/: delete or tombstone (plugin system removed in P2 3bbd97a). Success: directory removed or carries a tombstone README pointing at git history.

Reconcile the two open stubs carrying now-unsatisfiable analyzer-service.ts constraints (supersede or annotate against deleted code — do NOT attempt to satisfy). Success: both stubs annotated/superseded with a pointer to the P1 deletion (4443c6c).

Commit CODEREF-CORE doc changes by EXPLICIT path (main-only; never git add -A). Success: docs/CLI.md, README.md, guide-to-coderef-core.md, coderef/foundation-docs/*, examples/plugins removal committed on main. HARD STOP after for operator review before ASSISTANT-repo edits.

ASSISTANT SKILLS/CORE/rag-index + rag-search + rag-status SKILL.md: fix sqlite-default lie (json is canonical; sqlite is deprecated alias), correct artifact path, remove invalid '--provider custom' recommendation. Success: skill docs match shared cli-args reality (--store json, --flag=value, ollama-local default).

ASSISTANT SKILLS/CORE/coderef-pipeline + coderef-watch + coderef-rag-server SKILL.md: the documented entrypoints DROP the 'coderef-' bin prefix (docs say dist/src/cli/pipeline.js, watch.js, rag-server.js; real bins are coderef-pipeline.js, coderef-watch.js, coderef-rag-server.js — verified against dist/src/cli listing, gap GAP-03). Add the prefix on each 'Absolute entrypoint' + 'Entrypoint' line (2 per file). NOTE: coderef-scan is the EXCEPTION — it genuinely compiles to unprefixed scan.js, so do NOT prefix it (see P2-T3). Also fix any fictional flags. Success: every documented entrypoint resolves to a real dist bin; scan stays unprefixed; no fictional flags.

VERIFY-ONLY regression guard (gap GAP-04): the /discover gaps pass confirmed SKILLS/CORE/coderef-scan/SKILL.md is ALREADY correct — it uses a POSITIONAL <project_path> (no --project-dir) and the unprefixed scan.js bin. Expect 0 edits. Grep for the stale forms '--project-dir' and 'coderef-scan.js'; if either reappears, correct it, otherwise pass clean. A no-op here is SUCCESS, not a failure. Success: neither stale form present (or corrected if regressed).
Commit ASSISTANT skill changes by EXPLICIT path in the ASSISTANT repo (main-only). Success: all six CORE skill SKILL.md files committed on ASSISTANT main. HARD STOP after for operator review.

ASSISTANT PROJECT-CONTEXT/CODEREF-CORE/CONTEXT.md (auto-loaded every session — highest value): fix ~10 stale claims — SQLite default -> json store, '--type calls' -> canonical query types, '6 MCP tools' -> 11 tools, remove phantom src/rag/ dir, refresh baselines to 2411/257 + 29123 edges. Success: no claim contradicts the shipped 4cd33af reality.
Commit CONTEXT.md by EXPLICIT path in the ASSISTANT repo (main-only). Success: CONTEXT.md committed on ASSISTANT main. HARD STOP after for operator review before the reindex.

Confirm ollama daemon reachable + OPENAI_API_KEY absent from the process (strip if the inherited ghost is present) so the reindex resolves to ollama 768-dim. Success: rag-status/provider probe shows ollama; no cloud call.

Run incremental RAG reindex (ollama-local) to clear the 668 deleted-module refs from the 2026-06-12 vector index. Incremental path also exercises the P0 incremental-truth fix (deleted chunks actually removed). Success: rag-status shows fresh index, 0 refs to src/plugins/analyzer-service/sqlite-store/query-executor/llm-enricher/src-errors/coderef-search.

Live rag_search smoke against the reindexed store: query a known symbol (e.g. deduplicateElements) and confirm the hit resolves to the ACTUAL file:line (scanner.ts:648), not a drifted/nonexistent path. Success: hits point at real, current locations.

Restore CODEREF-CORE/.mcp.json from git history (git checkout -- .mcp.json). This re-establishes the project-local MCP registration with --project-dir, eliminating the fallback to the global ~/.claude.json entry that resolves .coderef/ from session cwd. Success: .mcp.json present with a --project-dir-bound coderef-core server entry.

Verify MCP server picks up the restored .mcp.json (11 tools, project-dir-bound) and that .coderef/ resolves to CODEREF-CORE regardless of session cwd. Success: codebase_summary returns the 2411-element baseline from any cwd.

Commit .mcp.json restore + all WO artifacts by EXPLICIT path in CODEREF-CORE (main-only). Success: .mcp.json + coderef/workorder/post-remediation-reality-sync/* committed on main. Final HARD STOP -> hand off to /close-workorder.

plan_adjustments_needed.description: Wrong edge-baseline metric. Original P1-T3 prescribed replacing the README baseline with '29123 edges' (statistics.edgeCount), but README:69 uses valid_edge_count (=3464 stale); reality anchor is valid_edge_count=5154. Prescribing 29123 would inject a NEW falsehood by conflating two edge metrics. RESOLUTION: P1-T3 rewritten to replace in-metric (valid_edge_count -> 5154 + current header_missing_count) with an explicit DO-NOT-substitute-edgeCount note. found_by=/discover gaps@medium 2026-07-03T01:27Z

Missed stale claim. The '6 read-only intelligence tools' lie (actual: 11) lives in README.md:67, not only CONTEXT.md. Plan originally fixed it only in P3-T1 (CONTEXT.md); the README copy was uncovered. RESOLUTION: added the README 6->11 tools fix as sub-item (b) of P1-T3. found_by=/discover gaps@medium 2026-07-03T01:27Z

Fix-direction imprecise. Skills point at dist/src/cli/pipeline.js|watch.js|rag-server.js; real bins are coderef-PREFIXED (coderef-pipeline.js etc.) per the dist/src/cli listing. Not phantom paths — a dropped prefix. coderef-scan is the exception (genuinely unprefixed scan.js). RESOLUTION: P2-T2 rewritten to add the coderef- prefix on each entrypoint line and note the scan exception. found_by=/discover gaps@medium 2026-07-03T01:27Z

No-op task. coderef-scan/SKILL.md already uses positional <project_path> + unprefixed scan.js; neither stale form (--project-dir, coderef-scan.js) is present, so the original EDIT task had nothing to change and a clean pass could read as a failure. RESOLUTION: P2-T3 verb changed EDIT->CHECK (verify-only regression guard); a no-op is now explicit success. found_by=/discover gaps@medium 2026-07-03T01:27Z

plan_type_rationale: Stub category=fix -> strict; correctness drift across two repos + two runtime artifacts; per-phase hard stops for review of each surface.
